values.server.items.Bandage_Crude.description: Use to quickly regain health.\n\nThough rudimentary, this type of bandage was favored by the knights of a lost civilization for the ease with which they could be fashioned from common materials on the battlefield.
values.server.items.Bandage_Crude.name: Bandage
values.server.items.Bandage_Potion_Test.name: Bandage Potion Test
values.server.items.Barrier.description: Invisible Block use to block off areas.
values.server.items.Barrier.name: Barrier Block
values.server.items.Bench_Alchemy.description: Used to create potions and elixirs.\n\nThe alchemists of old long sought the secrets to eternal life. Some might say they achieved that grand goal, though perhaps not in the form they imagined.
values.server.items.Bench_Alchemy.name: Alchemist's Workbench
values.server.items.Bench_Arcane.description: Used to fashion various arcane implements.\n\nThe arcane arts are the closest mere mortals have ever come to achieving Avatar powers. Had they mastered them sooner, perhaps they would not have been so easily swayed.
values.server.items.Bench_Arcane.name: Arcanist's Workbench
values.server.items.Bench_Architects.descriptio: Used to create building blocks and furniture. Even an Avatar needs a few comforts!
values.server.items.Bench_Architects.name: Architect's Workbench
values.server.items.Bench_Armory.description: The heart of any workshop. Used to forge advanced armor and weapons.
values.server.items.Bench_Armory.name: Forge
values.server.items.Bench_Armour.name: Armorer's Workbench
values.server.items.Bench_Builders.description: Used to create structural building blocks.
values.server.items.Bench_Builders.name: Builder's Workbench
values.server.items.Bench_Campfire.description: Cook basic meals.\n\nTo many an adventurer, the humble campfire is all it takes to declare a place "home." Unshakeable bonds can be forged while basking in its warmth and all great tales have sparked from its embers.
values.server.items.Bench_Campfire.name: Campfire
values.server.items.Bench_Cooking.description: A built-in kitchen that can be used to make advanced dishes.
values.server.items.Bench_Cooking.name: Chef's Stove
values.server.items.Bench_Farming.description: Used to craft farming accessories and animal feed.
values.server.items.Bench_Farming.name: Farmer's Workbench
values.server.items.Bench_Furnace.description: Used to process ore into metal bars. Upgrading reduces smelting times and increases storage capacity.
values.server.items.Bench_Furnace.name: Furnace
values.server.items.Bench_Furniture.description: Used to craft furniture, storage, and decorative items to personalize your home.
values.server.items.Bench_Furniture.name: Furniture Workbench
values.server.items.Bench_Loom.description: Used to process cloth and magical items into materials.
values.server.items.Bench_Loom.name: Loom
values.server.items.Bench_Lumbermill.name: Woodcutter's Block
values.server.items.Bench_Memories.description: A faint disembodied voice can be heard in the presence of this statue. Echoes of a being from beyond the barriers. From the original world.
values.server.items.Bench_Memories.name: The Heart of Orbis
values.server.items.Bench_Salvage.description: Can be used to break down some items into base materials.
values.server.items.Bench_Salvage.name: Salvager's Workbench
values.server.items.Bench_Tannery.description: Used to process raw hides into leather. Upgrading reduces processing times and increases storage capacity.
values.server.items.Bench_Tannery.name: Tanning Rack
values.server.items.Bench_Trough.description: Used to craft farming accessories and animal feed.
values.server.items.Bench_Trough.name: Trough - Feeding Bench
values.server.items.Bench_Weapon.name: Blacksmith's Anvil
values.server.items.Bench_WorkBench.description: A workstation enabling the crafting of more complex tools and items.\n\nNo artisan is born a creator. Even Avatars need time to hone their craft, particularly when bound by the rules of another's domain.
values.server.items.Bench_WorkBench.name: Workbench
values.server.items.Block_Spawner_Block.descrip: Spawns blocks from a BlockSpawnerTable asset during world generation.\n\nUse /blockspawner set <tableId> while looking at the block to configure.

values.server.items.Furniture_Temple_Dark_Statu: The whispers were not what compelled the Outlanders to settle in these colder lands. Yet it remains an unquestionable fact that when they arrived, the whispers were already there.
values.server.items.Furniture_Temple_Scarak_Sta: Long since forgotten by the fallen Scaraks, some few statues of the Founding Builder still stand in their oldest ruins. The few explorers who have since stumbled upon them speak only of an emanating sense of disappointment and disapproval - as if the stone itself was stained by its silent witness of the atrocities committed under the first and last Scarak Empress.
values.server.items.Furniture_Village_Bed.name: Simple Wooden Bed

values.server.items.Furniture_Village_Pot.name: Clay Pot

values.server.items.Hub_Portal_Zone3_Taiga1.des: Portal that teleports you to Zone 3 Taiga. Used in the Crossroads.
values.server.items.Ingredient_Bar_Adamantite.d: requires a high quality pickaxe to break.\n\nThis rare metal was once instrumental to the advancements made by the peoples of Crucible. Though little remains of the city's former splendor, traces of the resilient ore can still be found in the depths beneath those scorched lands.
values.server.items.Ingredient_Bar_Bronze.name: Bronze Ingot
values.server.items.Ingredient_Bar_Cobalt.descr: In Outlander myth, this metal is said to be cold to the touch, even when molten. While verifying this would be ill-advised, its origins amidst the frigid peaks and frozen caverns of their territory lend the story some credence.
values.server.items.Ingredient_Bar_Cobalt.name: Cobalt Ingot
values.server.items.Ingredient_Bar_Copper.descr: A common metal smelted from ore found throughout all regions of Orbis.
values.server.items.Ingredient_Bar_Copper.name: Copper Ingot
values.server.items.Ingredient_Bar_Gold.name: Gold Ingot
values.server.items.Ingredient_Bar_Iron.descrip: Its natural abundance and reliable strength make this the ideal candidate for fashioning common tools and weapons.
values.server.items.Ingredient_Bar_Iron.name: Iron Ingot
values.server.items.Ingredient_Bar_Mithril.name: Mithril Ingot
values.server.items.Ingredient_Bar_Onyxium.name: Onyxium Ingot
values.server.items.Ingredient_Bar_Prisma.name: Prisma Ingot
values.server.items.Ingredient_Bar_Silver.name: Silver Ingot
values.server.items.Ingredient_Bar_Thorium.desc: While Ferans do not themselves make use of this metal, they keep a vigilant watch over its deposits in the sun-scorched deserts and arid badlands. Should their age-old enemies rise once more, these reserves would be the first they sought to harvest.
values.server.items.Ingredient_Bar_Thorium.name: Thorium Ingot
values.server.items.Ingredient_Bolt_Cotton.name: Bolt of Cotton
values.server.items.Ingredient_Bolt_Linen.name: Bolt of Linen
values.server.items.Ingredient_Bolt_Silk.name: Bolt of Silk
values.server.items.Ingredient_Bolt_Wool.name: Bolt of Wool
values.server.items.Ingredient_Bone_Fragment.de: Orbis' most advanced civilizations shared a common trait - the hubris that ultimately led to their downfall. These bone fragments - and the cursed creature from which they were salvaged - should serve as a reminder that some paths are better left untrodden.
values.server.items.Ingredient_Charcoal.name: Charcoal
values.server.items.Ingredient_Chitin_Sturdy.de: This resilient material forms the exoskeletons of many creatures found throughout the lands.
values.server.items.Ingredient_Crystal_Red.name: Red Crystal Shards
values.server.items.Ingredient_Dough.name: Dough
values.server.items.Ingredient_Fabric_Scrap_Cin: When the cursed flame scoured Crucible it left nothing unchanged. Even these scraps of fabric - salvaged from the charred bones of a former denizen - continue to emit an uncanny heat.
values.server.items.Ingredient_Fabric_Scrap_Lin: Scraps of a common fabric used by many of Orbis' species to fashion their clothing.
values.server.items.Ingredient_Fabric_Scrap_Sha: This heavy fabric, imbued with a quiet brooding darkness, was devised by the Outlanders prior to their first communion with the Void. Though still a core component of their garb, the secret of its making has long since been lost.
values.server.items.Ingredient_Fibre.name: Plant Fiber
values.server.items.Ingredient_Fire_Essence.des: This energy once gave form to the dreams of Crucible's artisans. Today it merely lingers in the creatures that dwell amid the desolated volcanic regions.
values.server.items.Ingredient_Flour.name: Flour
values.server.items.Ingredient_Hay.name: Hay Bale
values.server.items.Ingredient_Hide_Dark.descri: Can be processed into <item is="Ingredient_Leather_Dark"/> at a <item is="Bench_Tannery"/>.
values.server.items.Ingredient_Hide_Dark.name: Dark Hide
values.server.items.Ingredient_Hide_Heavy.descr: Can be processed into <item is="Ingredient_Leather_Heavy"/> at a <item is="Bench_Tannery"/>.
values.server.items.Ingredient_Hide_Heavy.name: Heavy Hide
values.server.items.Ingredient_Hide_Light.descr: Can be processed into <item is="Ingredient_Leather_Light"/> at a <item is="Bench_Tannery"/>.
values.server.items.Ingredient_Hide_Light.name: Light Hide
values.server.items.Ingredient_Hide_Medium.desc: Can be processed into <item is="Ingredient_Leather_Medium"/> at a <item is="Bench_Tannery"/>.
values.server.items.Ingredient_Hide_Medium.name: Medium Hide
values.server.items.Ingredient_Hide_Prismic.des: Can be processed into <item is="Ingredient_Leather_Prismic"/> at a <item is="Bench_Tannery"/>.
values.server.items.Ingredient_Hide_Scaled.desc: Can be processed into <item is="Ingredient_Leather_Scaled"/> at a <item is="Bench_Tannery"/>.
values.server.items.Ingredient_Hide_Scaled.name: Scaled Hide
values.server.items.Ingredient_Hide_Soft.descri: Can be processed into <item is="Ingredient_Leather_Soft"/> at a <item is="Bench_Tannery"/>.
values.server.items.Ingredient_Hide_Soft.name: Soft Hide
values.server.items.Ingredient_Hide_Storm.descr: Can be processed into <item is="Ingredient_Leather_Storm"/> at a <item is="Bench_Tannery"/>.
values.server.items.Ingredient_Hide_Storm.name: Storm Hide
values.server.items.Ingredient_Ice_Essence.desc: When the Outlanders rejected the flame and split from their brethren, they turned instead toward the colder regions and the fragile strength found in the advancing sheets of ice.
values.server.items.Ingredient_Ice_Essence.name: Essence of Ice
values.server.items.Ingredient_Leather_Heavy.de: Processed from the thick hides of apex predators.\n\nEvery hunter aspires to bring down creatures spoken of only in myth. Save for a few who banded together during the age of heroes, most must be satisfied with bears, wolves, and other apex predators instead.
values.server.items.Ingredient_Leather_Light.de: Processed from the hides of common prey found throughout the wilds.
values.server.items.Ingredient_Leather_Medium.d: Processed from the resilient hides of mid-sized threats and armored beasts.
values.server.items.Ingredient_Life_Essence.des: A form of overflowing life energy found in abundance around plant life on Orbis. In great enough concentrations, perhaps it could even bring forth sentience where it was absent before.
values.server.items.Ingredient_Life_Essence_Con: An amalgamation equivalent to <color is="#3e9049">100 Essences of Life</color>.
values.server.items.Ingredient_Lightning_Essenc: Raging storms have proved attractive to many creatures over the centuries. Though the true source of such magic is nowhere to be found, the elementals born from its lingering traces still wander the lands.
values.server.items.Ingredient_Motes_Light.name: Motes of Light
values.server.items.Ingredient_Poop.name: Poop
values.server.items.Ingredient_Powder_Boom.name: Boom Powder
values.server.items.Ingredient_Sac_Venom.descri: Orbis is home to poisonous creatures of all shapes and sizes. Antidotes distilled from their venom by the Ferans were once prized across the lands.
values.server.items.Ingredient_Sac_Venom.name: Venom Sac
values.server.items.Ingredient_Salt.name: Salt
values.server.items.Ingredient_Spices.name: Spices
values.server.items.Ingredient_Stick.name: Stick
values.server.items.Ingredient_Stud_Iron.name: Iron Stud
values.server.items.Ingredient_Tree_Bark.name: Tree Bark
values.server.items.Ingredient_Tree_Sap.name: Tree Sap
values.server.items.Ingredient_Void_Essence.des: It's unclear whether creatures of the Void produce this essence, or if its presence is required to sustain their existence. What can be said for certain is that the two are inextricably bound.
values.server.items.Ingredient_Voidheart.descri: The still-beating heart of a greater denizen of the Void.\n\nNot all creatures are born of the Void, yet even those taken and corrupted may bear this same shriveled heart.
values.server.items.Ingredient_Voidheart.name: Voidheart
values.server.items.Ingredient_Water_Essence.de: Even fish have a natural affinity for magic. As water filters through their gills, the concentration grows. Perhaps therein lies the secret to the abyssal creatures lurking in Orbis' darkest depths.
values.server.items.Instance_Gateway.descriptio: A gateway that allows you to travel to different instances. Interact with it to configure the destination.
values.server.items.Instance_Gateway.name: Instance Gateway

values.server.items.PortalKey.description: Place in the <item is="Portal_Device"/> to visit this Fragment. \nWork In Progress
values.server.items.PortalKey_Hederas_Lair.desc: \n\nFew have experienced the terrors that lurk in Orbis' murkier depths.
values.server.items.PortalKey_Hederas_Lair.name: Fragment: Orbis - The Dread Wade
values.server.items.PortalKey_Henges.descriptio: \n\nMysterious henges tower over a frozen land.
values.server.items.PortalKey_Henges.name: Fragment: Orbis - Silent Henges
values.server.items.PortalKey_Jungles.descripti: \n\nDeep beneath the desolate wastelands left by an ancient civilization, a primordial haven thrives.
values.server.items.PortalKey_Jungles.name: Fragment: Orbis - Tal'Kesi Refuge
values.server.items.PortalKey_Taiga.description: \n\nThere are frozen forests into which not even an Outlander dares set foot, no matter how the whispers beckon.
values.server.items.PortalKey_Taiga.name: Fragment: Orbis - Dragonspire Weald
values.server.items.PortalKey_Windsurf_Valley.d: \n\nA Feran values freedom above all else, and nowhere is that freedom embodied more than in the winds of Windrider Valley.
values.server.items.Portal_Device.description: Place this in your base to tear down the barriers and travel to other Fragments! Work In Progress. Though the curse keeps Gaia's Orbis locked away, there are ways to pierce the Void that veils it.

values.server.items.Weapon_Spellbook_Rekindle_E:
Raises skeletal minions from nearby bone piles.

\• Only applies to the bones of species once bound to elemental fire.
• Minions despawn when their summoner is lost, or after 5 minutes.

<color is="#ccaa00">Consumes 1 grimoire per minion raised.</color>

values.server.memories.general.discovered.toolt: New memory discovered!\n\nReturn to The Heart of Orbis in the Forgotten Temple to restore it.
values.server.memories.general.featureUnlockedM: You've unlocked the Memories feature!\nWhen encountering creatures you'll collect memories that will be stored in your inventory.\nBring these memories back to the Heart of Orbis to record them and unlock rewards!
values.server.memories.general.featureUnlockedN: Memories unlocked! Explore the many versions of Orbis to collect memories!

values.server.memories.unlock.bullet1: Void's curse keeps Orbis locked away but there may yet be a way to break it.
values.server.memories.unlock.bullet2: A deity rests within this Heart of Orbis; seek out memories of Orbis' myriad creatures and record them here to restore her will.
values.server.memories.unlock.bullet3: Your inventory can now store a limited number of memories under a special section. \nReturn them to the Heart of Orbis to unlock a variety of rewards.
values.server.memories.unlock.title: You have unlocked the Memories Feature!

values.server.npc.tests.Test_Action_Model_Attac: Verify that NPC attachment is changed and restored
values.server.npc.tests.Test_Alarm: Verify that NPC alarm triggers after 1 day (note will begin as 'Passed' and set alarm after 15s)
values.server.npc.tests.Test_Animation_State_Ch: Verify that animations are played between states
values.server.npc.tests.Test_Attack_Bow: Verify correctly aims and uses ranged attack
values.server.npc.tests.Test_Attack_Flying_Rang: Verify can hit Test_Dummy NPC with flying ranged attack
values.server.npc.tests.Test_Bird_Land: Verify that NPC takes off and then successfully lands on hay blocks
values.server.npc.tests.Test_Block_Change: Verify that NPC reacts if player interacts with or damages statues
values.server.npc.tests.Test_Block_Sensor: Verify approaches statues and moves between them
values.server.npc.tests.Test_Bow_Charge: Verify correctly uses bow with different stages of charge
values.server.npc.tests.Test_Chained_Path: Verify that NPC chains different paths together in succession when nodes are placed close to the end of each path
values.server.npc.tests.Test_Combat_Sensor_Shee: Verify correctly interprets combat from sword/bow
values.server.npc.tests.Test_Crouch: Verify that NPC crouches if no mobs are present
values.server.npc.tests.Test_Dive_Flee: Verify NPC swims correctly (may need moving to water with entity tool)
values.server.npc.tests.Test_Drop_Item: Verify that NPC drops items in random directions within a 360 degree radius
values.server.npc.tests.Test_Entity_Damage_Even: Verify that NPC reacts to damage taken by other test NPCs
values.server.npc.tests.Test_Flock_Mixed: Verify flock members following and flock changes on entity deaths
values.server.npc.tests.Test_Group_Sheep: Verify flees from other test NPCs
values.server.npc.tests.Test_Hotbar_Weapon_Swap: Verify that NPC swaps hotbar weapons based on player distance
values.server.npc.tests.Test_In_Water: Verify that NPC correctly reports being in water (or not)
values.server.npc.tests.Test_Interaction_Comple: Verify can't interact with NPC without starting Trok_Interact task, and that interaction happens correctly
values.server.npc.tests.Test_Inventory_Contents: Verify NPC has 10 slots and decreases each time commands are used to give items
values.server.npc.tests.Test_Jumping: Verify NPC correctly jumps and drops down blocks
values.server.npc.tests.Test_Light_Sensor: Verify that reported light levels are accurate
values.server.npc.tests.Test_Model_Change: Verify that NPC correctly changes model when player is extremely close
values.server.npc.tests.Test_OffHand_Swap: Verify offhand items are held and swapped between
values.server.npc.tests.Test_Particle_Emotions: Verify that emotion particles correctly appear and disappear
values.server.npc.tests.Test_Place_Blocks: Verify that NPC places stacks two blocks high around them in four cardinal directions outside their hitbox
values.server.npc.tests.Test_Position_Adjustmen: Verify that NPC approaches Gaia statue but to a point slightly offset from it
values.server.npc.tests.Test_Probe: Verify that NPC probing values are correct
values.server.npc.tests.Test_Sensor_Age: Verify that NPC ageing happens correctly with passage of time
values.server.npc.tests.Test_Sensor_DroppedItem: Verify that NPC picks up dropped weapons
values.server.npc.tests.Test_Shoot_At_Block: Verify that NPC shoots at statues
values.server.npc.tests.Test_Spawn_Action: Verify NPC spawns other NPCs correctly
values.server.npc.tests.Test_Species_Attitude: Verify that NPC is friendly to Trorks but hostile to Kweebecs
values.server.npc.tests.Test_Standing_On_Block_: Verify that NPC correctly reports standing on grass, soil, leaves, and gold
values.server.npc.tests.Test_State_Evaluator_Sl: Verify that NPC sleeps at night and is awake during daytime
values.server.npc.tests.Test_State_Evaluator_To: Verify that NPC flees when HP is below 50% and approaches when above 50%
values.server.npc.tests.Test_Teleport: Verify that NPC correctly follows player by teleporting
values.server.npc.tests.Test_Throw_NPC: Verify NPC launches other NPCs at the player
values.server.npc.tests.Test_Timer_Repeating: Verify that timers appear to function
values.server.npc.tests.Test_Trigger_Spawners: Verify that NPC triggers nearby manual spawn markers
values.server.npc.tests.Test_Walk_Leave: Verify that NPC leaves the area using pathfinding to avoid obstacles
values.server.npc.tests.Test_Walk_Seek: Verify that NPC can follow player through complex environments using pathfinding
values.server.npc.tests.Test_Watch: Verify that NPC correctly tracks the player using head motion
values.server.npc.tests.Test_Weather_Sensor: Verify that NPC reports when it's raining and when it isn't

values.server.portals.attuningToWorld: The portal is still attuning to your new presence in this world...
values.server.portals.boreal.description:
There are frozen forests into which not even an Outlander dares set foot, no matter how the whispers beckon.

Legends about the region's name pile up: Mountains obscuring the sky, towering trees grazing the clouds, or perhaps ancient creatures born of elemental ice slumbering among the peaks.

<msg key="server.portals.incomplete.description"/>
values.server.portals.device.adjusted: The portal device was invalid and has been adjusted!
values.server.portals.device.blockEntityMisconf: The portal block requires a "Portal" block component, this is an asset misconfiguration
values.server.portals.device.blockEntityRefInva: The associated block entity reference is invalid!
values.server.portals.device.blockStateMisconfi: The portal block's state '{state}' doesn't exist, this is an asset misconfiguration
values.server.portals.device.blockTypeMisconfig: The portal block's type at {x}, {y}, {z} is invalid, this is an asset misconfiguration
values.server.portals.device.internalErrorSpawn: There was an internal error spawning the portal
values.server.portals.device.notInPortalWorld: You aren't in a portal world, so nothing happens!
values.server.portals.device.refInvalid: Your entity reference is invalid! Are you in a world?
values.server.portals.device.worldIsDead: The target world of this portal doesn't exist or disappeared
values.server.portals.device.worldNoSpawn: This portal is not quite ready, it's still channeling a return conduit!
values.server.portals.hederas_lair.description: Few have experienced the terrors that lurk in Orbis' murkier depths. Fewer still have returned unchanged.\n\n<msg key="server.portals.incomplete.description"/>
values.server.portals.hederas_lair.tip1: <color is="#05c09a">A ravenous menace lurks at the heart the swamp.</color>
values.server.portals.hederas_lair.tip2: <color is="#05c09a">The murky shallows are home to dangerous fauna.</color>
values.server.portals.henges.description:
At times, the line between truth and fiction blurs. Not every Fragment the Ancient Gateway shows you will hold the truths you seek.

Yet, surely nothing exists without purpose. Perhaps that leads us to a different question: who built these Ancient Gateways, and why?

<msg key="server.portals.incomplete.description"/>
values.server.portals.incomplete.description: The energies within this Fragment have yet to take their final form. All you encounter within - lore, function, and form - awaits its true shape.
values.server.portals.jungles.description: Deep beneath the desolate wastelands left by an ancient civilization, a primordial haven thrives.\n\n<msg key="server.portals.incomplete.description"/>
values.server.portals.oasis.description:
A Feran values freedom above all else, and nowhere is that freedom embodied more than in the winds of Windrider Valley.

It was here that they sought refuge in the darkest years of their history, setting up camps where the towering canyon walls might hide them from view.

<msg key="server.portals.incomplete.description"/>
values.server.portals.taiga.tip1: <color is="#05c09a">A mythical beast sleeps here, bound in an\neternal slumber.</color>
values.server.portals.windsurf_valley.tip1: <color is="#05c09a">On occasion, a Mage Tower may be found here.</color>
